params.name: Four Architecture Books
params.description: The Four Books of Architecture is a classic of architectural theory, created by Renaissance Italian architect Andrea Palladio. The book is divided into four parts: the first book introduces the basic techniques and principles of architecture, including the five classical orders, building materials, room arrangements, and the construction of various parts of buildings; the second book discusses residential building design, combining Palladio's own design cases to demonstrate how to balance ancien …
